# APF range (black)
update img set apf_rng = 'black' where id in (
1030,1031,1032,1033,1034,1047,1048,1066,1067,1122,1123,1135,1136,1304,1305,1306,
1307,1316,1317,1386,1387,1390,1391,1394,1395,1425,1426,1430,1431,1448,1449,1467,
1534,1535,1552,1553
);


# APF range (blue)
update img set apf_rng = 'blue' where id in (
1064,1065,1203,1218,1219,1220,1221,1222,1223,1224,1225,1298,1299,1318,
1319,1336,1341,1342,1388,1389,1415,1416,1417,1418,1432,1433,1434,1456,
1457,1515,1518,1519,1528,1529,1542,1543,1544,1545,1546,1547,1550,1551
);


# APF range (green)
update img set apf_rng = 'green' where id in (
1060,1061,1095,1097,1124,1125,1127,1129,1435,1436,1451,1452,1453,1454,
1512,1514
);


# APF range (red)
update img set apf_rng = 'red' where id in (
1035,1036,1037,1038,1052,1053,1216,1217,1228,1229,1234,1322,1323,
1324,1325,1330,1331,1332,1333,1373,1374,1437,1438,1510,1511,1548,
1549
);


# APF white font
update img set flag1 = (flag1 | (1 << 5)) where id in (
1029,1030,1031,1032,1033,1034,1047,1048,1052,1053,1064,1065,1066,
1067,1122,1123,1135,1136,1203,1218,1219,1220,1221,1222,1223,1224,
1225,1298,1299,1304,1305,1306,1307,1316,1317,1318,1319,1330,1331,
1332,1333,1336,1341,1342,1373,1374,1386,1387,1390,1391,1394,1395,
1415,1416,1417,1418,1425,1426,1430,1431,1432,1433,1434,1437,1438,
1448,1449,1456,1457,1467,1518,1519,1521,1522,1528,1529,1534,1535,
1542,1543,1544,1545,1546,1547,1550,1551,1552,1553
);


# APF superscript (-1)
update img set flag1 = (flag1 | (1 << 3)) where id in (
1216
);

# APF superscript (+1)
update img set flag1 = (flag1 | (1 << 4)) where id in (
1220,1222,1546,1547
);


# APF may fire wire guided missiles
update img set flag1 = (flag1 | (1 << 2)) where id in (
1052,1053,1064,1065,1218,1219,1220,1221,1222,1223,1224,1225
);




# Champion  (star)
update img set flag3 = (flag3 | (1 << 2)) where id in (
1056,1057,1095,1097,1100,1102,1105,1107,1110,1112,1118,1120,1140,1142,1143,1145
);



# hero (rifle)
update img set flag3 = (flag3 | (1 << 1)) where id in (
1045,1046,1062,1063,1213,1214
);




# commander (tank)
update img set flag3 = (flag3 | 1) where id in (
1050,1051
);


# wheel
update img set flag3 = (flag3 | (1 << 4)) where id in (
1098,1099
);




# track
update img set flag3 = (flag3 | (1 << 3)) where id in (
1025,1026,1035,1036,1037,1038,1039,1040,1058,1059,1060,1061,1064,1065,1069,1070,1124,1125,1126,1127,1128,1129,1130,1131,1132,1133,
1137,1138,1146,1147,1216,1217,1218,1219,1220,1221,1222,1223,1224,1225,1228,1229,1230,1231,1232,1233
);




update img set flag3 = (flag3 | (1 << 6)) where id = 1179;
update img set flag3 = (flag3 | (1 << 5)) where id in
(
1226,
1227,
1234
);
update img set flag3 = (1 << 6) where id in
(
1179,
1226,
1227,
1234
);
